pageContext.name: Fred & Daphne
pageContext.description: 'Looks Like We've Got Another Mystery On Our Hands.'  Sideshow and MG Collectibles and Toys are excited to present the Fred & Daphne 1:6 Scale Statue!  Watch as the pair tiptoe through the graveyard in their iconic outfits, as they try to help the rest of the gang to solve the mystery. Both Fred Jones and Daphne Blake include extra hand sculpts for alternate display choices.  Any true Scooby-Doo fan knows just how much each beloved character means to them. Complete your Scooby-Doo collectible series with this one-of-a-kind Fred & Daphne Statue! Purchase the Velma and Scooby-Doo & Shaggy statues to complete your diorama collection and build your own Mystery Inc. scene!
